raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "pahr Nakti paueetu / kad wiꞥſch
nu eegahje/ tad apſehdehs wiꞥſch
kahda Piſſahta Eelâ/ jo tur ne
bija ne weens/ kas fawa Nam-
mâ teem gribbeja zaur Nakti
Mahjas-Weetu doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "16. Un redſ/weenſwezz Wihr̄
nahze no fawa Darba no Tihr̄u-
ma Wakkarâ/un tas Wihr̄ bija
arridsan no Cetwrâima Kalneem/
bet mitte ka Sweſchineeks eeſsch
Gibejas/ bet tahs Weetas Lau-
dis bija Jemini Behrni.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "17. Kad wiꞥſch nu fawas Az-
zis pazeble/ tad eerandſija wiꞥſch
to Zetta-Wihru Piſſahta Eelâ/
un tas wezzajs Wihr̄ fazzija :
us kurren tu eiſ? un no kurrenes
tu nahz?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "18. Un tas fazzija us wiꞥſch:
mehe rahkam no Betlemes Juh-
da/ fahnis Cetwrâima Kalneem/
no kurrenes es arri efimu / un es
biju nogahjis us Betlemi Juh-
da/ un es eemu us ta KUNGA
Nammu/ un ne weens ne irr/
kas man fawa Namina Mahjas-
Weetu dohd.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "19. Kur tomehr Salimu ir Eh-
dania inuns preeſsch muhfeein
Ehſekteem irr/ir Maise un Wihr̄s
preeſsch mann un tawas Kalpo-
nes un preeſsch ta Puſcha / kas
pee taweem Kalpeem irr / inuns
ne truhſt ne kahda Leeta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "20. Tad fazzija tas wezzajs
Wihr̄s: Effi ar Meern/wiſs tas
tew truhſt irr pee man/ne paleez
tikai pahr Nakti us Eelu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "21. Un wiꞥſch wedde to fawa
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Namina/ un deewe preeſsch teen
Ehſekteem Barribu / kad tee ni
farwas Rahjas biji masgaifschi/tad
ehde un dſehre tee.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "22. Kad nu tee fawu Sird
atspirdſinaja/ redſ/ tad apstah-
jehs ta Piſſahta Wihr̄/ blehdi-
gi Laudis to Nammu/ un klaud-
ſinaja pee Durwin/ un tee faz-
zija us to wezzu Wihr̄u ta Nam-
ma Saimneeku: Iſwed to Wihr̄-
ru/ kas tawâ Namma nahzis irr/
ka mehs to atſibſtam.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "23. Un tas Wihr̄/ ta Nam-
ma Saimneeks isgahje pee teen/
un fazzija us teem : ne ta mann
Brahti/ne darrajt/inhdsant/tah-
du Kannu/pehz to/ ka schis Wihr̄-
imannâ Namma nahzis irr / tad
ne darrajt fcho Trakkuuu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "24. Redſi / man irr weena
Meita / weena Jumprawa/ un
wiꞥſcham weena leeke Seewu/to
gribbu es jums iswest / ka juhe-
tahs apſincijaht/un tahm darat/
kas jums patihk/bet pee fcha Wihr̄-
ra ne darat tahdn trakku Leetu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "25. Bet tee Wihr̄ ne gribbe-
ja to klaſſiht / tad tagrahbe tas
Wihr̄s fawu leeſu Seewu/ un is-
wedde to pee wiꞥſchem ahra/ un
tee atſinne wiꞥſchu / un apſinehje
wiꞥſchu zaur Nakti/lihds Rihtam/
un atlaidē to/kad Gaistma mettehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "26. Un fchi Seewa nahze ap
Rihta Latku/ un kritte pee Sem-
mes preeſsch ta Wihr̄a Namma
Durwin/ fur winnas Kungs
eeſcha bija/ (un gulleeja tur) lihds
patt Gaifmai.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
